title: StoryBible (P1 L1 World — M1 seeds style; M8 adds world prose + global negative + spine)

world.description: M8: long-form world summary (markdown). Authoring context for the author + future Muse; NOT auto-injected into generation.

style.description: MIRROR of the ACTIVE style (id/fragment/enabled_default/global_negative) — kept for back-compat + this required field; the canonical store is `styles[]` + `active_style_id` (2026-06-13: multiple named styles).

global_negative.description: M8: a negative prompt auto-applied to every generation (same apply_style gate as the fragment) — appended to the request's negative_prompt.

styles.description: L1 style COLLECTION (2026-06-13): named prompt/style snippets, selectable per generation. `active_style_id` is the default; `style` mirrors the active entry.

sample.description: Pass 2 (2026-06-21): a persistent SAMPLE thumbnail for this style — a durable copy in bible/styles/<id>.<ext>, generated via the L1 preview (a project-scoped t2i with this style applied). Survives source-job deletion.

active_style_id.description: the default style id (used when a generation doesn't pick one).

style_enabled_default.description: the story-level style on/off gate (a per-gen apply_style overrides it).

spine.description: M8 story spine (§6): premise + characters that seed stub AssetProfiles (R55: manual create + re-sync, never auto-clobber).

snippet.description: the prompt-template snippet a stub AssetProfile inherits (R112: the version's fixed identity clause).

linked_asset_id.description: the AssetProfile id this spine character was materialized into (set on create-stub; re-sync pushes the snippet to it).
